MMLEADS in the MDCD_OT_MC_CAPTD_SPEND variable. 

CCW calculates this variable as the sum of all MDCD_PD_AMT from the non-capitated payment Other 
Services (header) claims. The Center for Medicaid and CHIP Services (CMCS) at CMS has required
